ResearchProjectDef.label: Lattice Integration
ResearchProjectDef.description: Establish a basic connection to the Terminal Depths AI ecosystem. Unlocks the Lattice Terminal, allowing colonists to upload daily logs and receive simple task assignments from Gordon.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Advanced Lattice Protocols
ResearchProjectDef.description: Upgrade the Lattice connection with dedicated inference hardware. Enables AI Council voting, blueprint generation, and direct Serena analytics queries via the Lattice Console.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Lattice Nexus
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build the colony's primary Lattice node. The Nexus broadcasts full telemetry to NuSyQ-Hub, runs Gordon's orchestration daemon locally, and confers the "Lattice-Linked" aura to nearby colonists.
